title: Legacy and Love for Loons: The Conners Lake floating platform in Anchorage, Alaska
summary: View of the platform and a loon summer 2021. Credit: USFWS/Tamara Zeller Thanks to the efforts of dedicated volunteers and conservation staff, a pair of Pacific loons nesting at Connors Lake in Anchorage successfully hatched two chicks. Normally, a city lake adjacent to a busy dog park wouldn’t attract...
